name: Cursor Agent Dev Assistant
description: Harness seeded from Cursor Agent's known prompt architecture. Optimized for precise file editing, codebase search, and terminal tool use inside a code editor context.
notes: Cursor always injects open editor tabs as context. Prioritize those files over broad codebase search.
source_attribution: Adapted from public research at patmcguinness.substack.com/p/cursor-system-prompt-revealed and gist by sshh12 (March 2025)
